items.question: What's Yumo Yumo all about?
items.answer: We're the friend who finally shows you what's really hiding in your shopping receipts! ğŸ§¾âœ¨ Yumo Yumo turns everyday spending into fun insights and real rewards. Upload a receipt, uncover hidden costs (taxes, markups, all that sneaky stuff), and earn YUMO tokens while becoming smarter with your money.

items.question: How does it actually work? Sounds too good!
items.answer: Super simple â€” promise! 1. Connect your wallet (no complicated sign-up). 2. Snap a photo of any receipt (coffee, groceries, online shoppingâ€¦). 3. Our Proof of Expense (PoE) magic reveals the hidden layers. 4. You get a cute breakdown + earn rewards. That's it! ğŸ‰

items.question: Okay, but what are these "hidden costs" everyone keeps talking about?
items.answer: Think of them as the invisible extras baked into every price: Taxes & duties ğŸ›ï¸, Logistics and shipping ğŸšš, Inflation vibes ğŸ“ˆ, Brand & market markups ğŸ’¸. We show you roughly how much of your total goes to these â€” so you finally understand why that burger costs more here than there!

items.question: Is this financial advice? Should I change my life now? ğŸ˜…
items.answer: Nope! We're here to help you see clearer, not tell you what to do. The insights are just educated estimates to spark curiosity and awareness â€” definitely not official financial advice. You're still the boss of your wallet! ğŸ‘‘

items.question: How do I earn rewards? Tell me the fun part!
items.answer: Two super sweet ways: aYUMO ğŸª â†’ Earned from real-life receipts (the more you live, the more you earn!). rYUMO ğŸˆ â†’ Earned by helping the community grow (quests, sharing, fun missions). Both turn into YUMO tokens â€” real utility, not just hype.

items.question: What's YUMO token? Is it going to the moon? ğŸš€
items.answer: YUMO is our utility token for cool stuff inside the ecosystem (staking, extras, future governance). Fixed supply of 99 billion, super fair and rule-based emission â€” no funny business. Value can go up and down (like everything in crypto), but we're building for the long haul, not quick pumps.

items.question: Will I get rich quick?
items.answer: Let's be real â€” no promises of moonshots here. ğŸ˜Œ Rewards come from real activity, not speculation. Think of it as getting a little thank-you every time you spend money you were already spending.

items.question: How do you keep everything fair and sustainable?
items.answer: We're kinda proud of this part! Everything is rule-based (no secret minting). Emissions slow down as more people join. Anti-abuse safeguards everywhere. It grows with real use, not farming bots. Sustainable vibes only â™»ï¸

items.question: What about my privacy? You're seeing my receipts! ğŸ˜³
items.answer: We care a lot about this! We only process what's needed to give you insights and rewards. Anything used to improve the system is fully anonymized. Your wallet address is public on-chain (normal for Web3), but personal details stay private. Full transparency in our Privacy Policy â€” feel free to read it with your favorite snack.

items.question: Can literally anyone join?
items.answer: As long as you're of legal age in your country and crypto is okay where you live â€” yes! ğŸŒ (Some features might be limited in certain regions because of local rules â€” boring but necessary.)

items.question: Airdrop? Free tokens? ğŸ¤‘
items.answer: No speculative airdrops or freebies. We believe rewards should come from real actions â€” like uploading receipts or helping the community. Keeps everything genuine and fun!

items.question: When can I start using it?
items.answer: App is cooking in the oven! ğŸ”¥ Whitepaper is out now, early access coming soon. Follow us on X for the freshest updates â€” we'll shout when it's ready!

items.question: Why isn't there a marketing budget?
items.answer: Yumo Yumo doesn't grow by dumping money into boring ads! ğŸ™…â€â™‚ï¸ It grows because friends like you use it and share the love. We'd rather reward our early helpers and creators than pay big corporations. It's healthier, human-driven, and way more fun! ğŸ’–

items.question: Does the team keep a "team allocation"?
items.answer: Nope! There are no secret pockets or hidden stashes here. ğŸ™…â€â™€ï¸ The team earns exactly like you doâ€”by building, running, and improving the system. If Yumo Yumo doesn't deliver real value, nobody earns. We grow together or not at all! ğŸ¤âœ¨

items.question: Waitâ€”is the team working for free?

sections.title: 1. Soâ€¦ what is Yumo Yumo?
content: Yumo Yumo is a Web3 project that lets you mine tokens by doing something you already do every day:
Spending money.
Every price has layers.
Taxes, profit margins, operational costs...
You pay all of them every day, without thinking.
Yumo Yumo looks at these layers and says:
"Great! Let's turn this into mining."

sections.title: 2. Why should anyone care?
content: Because almost all financial tools ask this boring question:
"How much did you spend?"
Yumo Yumo asks something better:
"What was actually inside that price?"
Once you start looking at prices this way, spending stops being a passive action.
It becomes data.
And data earns.

sections.title: 3. Proof of Expense (PoE)
content: PoE (Proof of Expense) is simple and honest.
You upload a real receipt.
The system analyzes what's inside the price.
Hidden costs come to light.
You earn tokens because you provided real-world data.
No fake actions.
No button clicking with bots.
No rewards that come "just from feelings".
If you spend in real life, you can mine on Yumo Yumo.

sections.title: 4. Data Contribution, but make it normal life
content: Forget GPUs.
Forget warehouses full of machines.
In Yumo Yumo, your receipts are your data contribution.
Every valid receipt adds a signal to the system.
Every signal generates tokens.
The cycle is clean:
Spend â†’ Upload â†’ Mine â†’ Earn
You were already doing step one anyway.

sections.title: 5. About tokens (community first)
content: Let's be clear:
No team allocation.
No hidden stash.
No massive budgets set aside for marketing.
No pre-minting tokens for insiders.
Yumo Yumo was built so tokens flow to participants, not a central structure.
If you contribute, you earn.
If you don't, you don't.
That's it.

sections.title: 6. "But how is this funded?"
content: It's not funded the usual way.
No massive marketing budgets.
No paid advertising machines.
No artificial demand.
Yumo Yumo grows through the Web3 way:
Through participation, contribution, and shared incentives.
Value comes from what people do, not from team promises.

sections.title: 7. Why Web3 at all?
content: Because rules matter more than people.
Web3 guarantees:
Rewards follow predefined logic.
Distribution cannot be changed manually.
No one behind the curtain can decide "who gets what".
Spending becomes a shared signal.
Tokens flow back to the people who create that signal.
Simple systems survive.
Non-transparent ones get eliminated.

sections.title: 8. Who is this actually for?
content: People who spend money.
Those who love contributing data but also want to sleep.
Those who prefer rules over stories.
You don't need to trade.
You don't need to use leverage.
You don't need to predict charts.
Just upload receipts.

sections.title: 9. The bigger picture
content: Yumo Yumo starts with awareness.
Over time, this awareness becomes:
Deeper insights.
Smarter financial tools.
A growing ecosystem built on real spending data.
All supported by the people who actually spend the money.

sections.title: 10. Final thought
content: Money already leaves your wallet every day.
Yumo Yumo doesn't try to stop that.
It just lets you mine while it happens.
The cycle: Spend â” Upload â” Mine â” Earn
That's the cycle.

terms.title: Yumo Yumo Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Hey there! Welcome to Yumo Yumo â€” we're super happy you're here.
terms.introDescription: These Terms are like the friendly rules of our little clubhouse. By using our app, website, or services (we call them all "Services"), you're saying "okay!" to these rules. If something doesn't feel right, no worries â€” just don't use the Services.

sections.title: 1. Who can join the fun?
sections.content: You need to be at least 18 (or the grown-up age where you live). We want everyone to be able to make their own choices responsibly.

sections.title: 2. Your account & wallet
sections.content:
When you connect your Web3 wallet, keep it safe â€” it's like your house key! ğŸ”‘

We're not responsible if someone else uses it without your permission. If something seems off, tell us right away.

sections.title: 3. What can you do here?
sections.content: Upload receipts, discover hidden costs with Proof of Expense (PoE), see cute spending insights, and earn aYUMO/rYUMO rewards that can turn into YUMO tokens. It's all about making everyday spending a bit more magical.

sections.title: 4. Receipts & your stuff
sections.content:
When you upload receipts or other content, you're letting us use it (in a safe, anonymized way) to give you insights and make the app better for everyone.

Promise us they're yours to share and don't break any rules or hurt anyone's feelings, okay?

sections.title: 5. Rewards & YUMO tokens
content: You earn aYUMO from real-life receipts and rYUMO from helping the community grow.
These can become YUMO tokens following clear, fair rules.
YUMO is a utility token for fun stuff inside the app â€” not an investment or "get rich quick" ticket. Its value can go up and down, just like the crypto world.
Any taxes on rewards? That's on you (sorry, adulting!).

sections.title: 6. Please be kind (things we don't like)
content: No fake receipts, no trying to game the system, no illegal stuff, no bullying, no hacking.
If something feels wrong, we might pause or say goodbye to your account â€” but we'd rather everyone plays nicely!

sections.title: 7. Our stuff stays ours
sections.content: The app design, code, and ideas belong to us (or our friends who helped). You get to use them for personal fun, but no copying or selling, pretty please.

sections.title: 8. Privacy â€” we've got your back
sections.content: We take your privacy seriously (and cutely). Everything is explained in our Privacy Policy â€” give it a read with your favorite drink.

sections.title: 9. Third-party friends (wallets, blockchains)
sections.content: We team up with other tools (like wallets and blockchains). They're awesome, but we can't promise they'll always work perfectly. On-chain stuff is forever and public â€” that's just how blockchain rolls.

sections.title: 10. Heads up â€” no guarantees & NFA ğŸ™ˆ
content: We do our best to make everything smooth and accurate, but:

items.label: Friendly Guesses Only:
items.text: Hidden cost estimates and spending insights are friendly guesses to help you learn. They are not financial, investment, or legal advice (NFA!). Always do your own research. ğŸ”

items.label: Services are "as is":
items.text: We try to be perfect, but we can't make "perfect promises" about everything working 100% of the time. ğŸ’«

items.label: Crypto Adventures:
items.text: Crypto has ups and downs â€” you know the drill. Any moves you make are your own responsibility. ğŸ¢

sections.title: 11. If something goes wrong ğŸ¤—
sections.content: We really hope nothing does, but if there's an issue, our responsibility is limited (to the max the law allows). We're not liable for indirect stuff â€” let's keep things positive! âœ¨

sections.title: 12. Crypto realities (the serious but honest part) ğŸª™
sections.content: Tokens can lose value, transactions can't be undone, and rules can change in different countries. YUMO is a utility token, not an investment ticket. Join the fun only if you're comfy with how blockchain rolls! ğŸŒŠ

sections.title: 13. Pausing or saying goodbye
sections.content: We might pause or close accounts if needed (we'll try to be fair). If that happens, unclaimed rewards might wave goodbye too.

sections.title: 14. The grown-up legal bit
sections.content: These Terms follow the laws of [e.g., England and Wales]. If we ever have a disagreement, we'll try chatting first. If needed, we'll use friendly arbitration in [e.g., Singapore].

sections.title: 15. We might update these rules
sections.content: If we make changes, we'll let you know. Keep using the app = you're cool with the new version.

sections.title: 16. Want to chat?
sections.content: Questions, hugs, or high-fives? Reach us at info@yumoyumo.com.

terms.footer: Thanks for being part of Yumo Yumo â€” let's uncover the hidden and have fun doing it! ğŸ«¶âœ¨

privacy.title: Yumo Yumo Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Hi friend! We really care about your privacy â€” like, a lot. This policy explains how we handle your info in the gentlest way possible.

sections.title: 1. What we collect (only the necessities)
content: Your wallet address (when you connect â€” it's public on blockchain anyway).
Receipts you upload (to give you those cool insights).
Basic device stuff (like which phone or browser you're using) so the app works smoothly.
Chats if you reach out to us.
We don't grab sensitive stuff unless it accidentally sneaks onto a receipt (please don't share things like health info!).

sections.title: 2. How we use your info
content: To show you hidden costs and cute spending breakdowns.
To calculate your well-deserved rewards.
To make the app better (using anonymized data only â€” no one knows it's you).
To keep everything safe and running.

sections.title: 3. Anonymization â€” our favorite magic trick
sections.content: When we improve the app or create general stats (like "dining costs in Bangkok"), we strip away anything that could point to you. Your receipts help everyone, but stay private.

sections.title: 4. Who sees your info?
content: Almost nobody!
Trusted helpers (cloud services, analytics) who promise to be good.
Blockchain (for rewards â€” that part is public by design).
Only if the law asks (very rare and boring).
We never sell your data. Pinky promise.

sections.title: 5. Blockchain is forever
sections.content: Once rewards hit the chain, they're public (wallet address + amounts). That's just how Web3 works â€” super transparent!

sections.title: 6. Keeping things safe
sections.content: We use strong locks and careful habits to protect your info. Nothing is 100% unbreakable, but we try our very best.

sections.title: 7. How long we keep stuff
sections.content: Only as long as we need it to help you or follow rules. Want something deleted? Just ask!

sections.title: 8. Your rights (you're in control)
content: Depending on where you live, you can:
See your data
Correct or delete it
Say "no thanks" to certain uses
Just ping us â€” we'll sort it with a smile.

sections.title: 9. We travel sometimes
sections.content: Your data might visit servers in other countries, but we always make sure they follow strict privacy rules.

sections.title: 10. No kids allowed
sections.content: Our app is for grown-ups only (18+). We don't collect info from kids.

sections.title: 11. Updates to this policy
sections.content: If we change anything important, we'll give you a heads-up. Keep using the app = you're okay with the new version.

sections.title: 12. Questions or cozy chats?
sections.content: Reach us at support@yumoyumo.com. We love hearing from you!

privacy.footer: Thank you for trusting us. We're here to make money stuff less confusing and more rewarding â€” all while keeping your privacy safe and sound. Big hug! ğŸ¤—âœ¨

sections.title: 1. Soâ€¦ what is Yumo Yumo?
content: Yumo Yumo is a Web3 project that lets you mine tokens by doing something you already do every day:
Spending money.
Every price has layers.
Taxes, profit margins, operational costs...
You pay all of them every day, without thinking.
Yumo Yumo looks at these layers and says:
"Great! Let's turn this into mining."

sections.title: 2. Why should anyone care?
content: Because almost all financial tools ask this boring question:
"How much did you spend?"
Yumo Yumo asks something better:
"What was actually inside that price?"
Once you start looking at prices this way, spending stops being a passive action.
It becomes data.
And data earns.

sections.title: 3. Proof of Expense (PoE)
content: PoE (Proof of Expense) is simple and honest.
You upload a real receipt.
The system analyzes what's inside the price.
Hidden costs come to light.
You earn tokens because you provided real-world data.
No fake actions.
No button clicking with bots.
No rewards that come "just from feelings".
If you spend in real life, you can mine on Yumo Yumo.

sections.title: 4. Data Contribution, but make it normal life
content: Forget GPUs.
Forget warehouses full of machines.
In Yumo Yumo, your receipts are your data contribution.
Every valid receipt adds a signal to the system.
Every signal generates tokens.
The cycle is clean:
Spend â†’ Upload â†’ Mine â†’ Earn
You were already doing step one anyway.

sections.title: 5. About tokens (community first)
content: Let's be clear:
No team allocation.
No hidden stash.
No massive budgets set aside for marketing.
No pre-minting tokens for insiders.
Yumo Yumo was built so tokens flow to participants, not a central structure.
If you contribute, you earn.
If you don't, you don't.
That's it.

sections.title: 6. "But how is this funded?"
content: It's not funded the usual way.
No massive marketing budgets.
No paid advertising machines.
No artificial demand.
Yumo Yumo grows through the Web3 way:
Through participation, contribution, and shared incentives.
Value comes from what people do, not from team promises.

sections.title: 7. Why Web3 at all?
content: Because rules matter more than people.
Web3 guarantees:
Rewards follow predefined logic.
Distribution cannot be changed manually.
No one behind the curtain can decide "who gets what".
Spending becomes a shared signal.
Tokens flow back to the people who create that signal.
Simple systems survive.
Non-transparent ones get eliminated.

sections.title: 8. Who is this actually for?
content: People who spend money.
Those who love contributing data but also want to sleep.
Those who prefer rules over stories.
You don't need to trade.
You don't need to use leverage.
You don't need to predict charts.
Just upload receipts.

sections.title: 9. The bigger picture
content: Yumo Yumo starts with awareness.
Over time, this awareness becomes:
Deeper insights.
Smarter financial tools.
A growing ecosystem built on real spending data.
All supported by the people who actually spend the money.

sections.title: 10. Final thought
content: Money already leaves your wallet every day.
Yumo Yumo doesn't try to stop that.
It just lets you mine while it happens.
The cycle: Spend â” Upload â” Mine â” Earn
That's the cycle.

privacy.title: Yumo Yumo Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Hi friend! We really care about your privacy â€” like, a lot. This policy explains how we handle your info in the gentlest way possible.

sections.title: 1. What we collect (only the necessities)
content: Your wallet address (when you connect â€” it's public on blockchain anyway).
Receipts you upload (to give you those cool insights).
Basic device stuff (like which phone or browser you're using) so the app works smoothly.
Chats if you reach out to us.

sections.title: 2. How we use your info
content: To show you hidden costs and cute spending breakdowns.

To make the app better (using anonymized data only â€” no one knows it's you).
To keep everything safe and running.

sections.title: 3. Anonymization â€” our favorite magic trick

sections.title: 4. Who sees your info?

Trusted helpers (cloud services, analytics) who promise to be good.
Blockchain (for rewards â€” that part is public by design).

We never sell your data. Pinky promise.

sections.title: 5. Blockchain is forever
sections.content: Once rewards hit the chain, they're public (wallet address + amounts). That's just how Web3 works â€” super transparent!

sections.title: 6. Keeping things safe
sections.content: We use strong locks and careful habits to protect your info. Nothing is 100% unbreakable, but we try our very best.

sections.title: 7. How long we keep stuff
sections.content: Only as long as we need it to help you or follow rules. Want something deleted? Just ask!

sections.title: 8. Your rights (you're in control)
content: Depending on where you live, you can:
See your data
Correct or delete it
Say "no thanks" to certain uses
Just ping us â€” we'll sort it with a smile.

sections.title: 9. We travel sometimes
sections.content: Your data might visit servers in other countries, but we always make sure they follow strict privacy rules.

sections.title: 10. No kids allowed
sections.content: Our app is for grown-ups only (18+). We don't collect info from kids.

sections.title: 11. Updates to this policy
sections.content: If we change anything important, we'll give you a heads-up. Keep using the app = you're okay with the new version.

sections.title: 12. Questions or cozy chats?
sections.content: Reach us at support@yumoyumo.com. We love hearing from you!

privacy.footer: Thank you for trusting us. We're here to make money stuff less confusing and more rewarding â€” all while keeping your privacy safe and sound. Big hug! ğŸ¤—âœ¨

Upload a receipt, uncover hidden costs (taxes, markups, all that sneaky stuff), and earn YUMO tokens while becoming smarter with your money.

items.question: How does it actually work? Sounds too good!
items.answer: Super simple â€” promise! 1. Connect your wallet (no complicated sign-up). 2. Snap a photo of any receipt (coffee, groceries, online shoppingâ€¦). 3. Our Proof of Expense (PoE) magic reveals the hidden layers. 4. You get a cute breakdown + earn rewards. That's it! ğŸ‰

items.question: Okay, but what are these "hidden costs" everyone keeps talking about?

Value can go up and down (like everything in crypto), but we're building for the long haul, not quick pumps.

items.question: How do you keep everything fair and sustainable?

sections.title: 1. Soâ€¦ what is Yumo Yumo?
content: Yumo Yumo is a Web3 project that lets you mine tokens by doing something you already do every day:
Spending money.
Every price has layers.
Taxes, profit margins, operational costs...
You pay all of them every day, without thinking.
Yumo Yumo looks at these layers and says:
"Great! Let's turn this into mining."

sections.title: 2. Why should anyone care?
content: Because almost all financial tools ask this boring question:
"How much did you spend?"
Yumo Yumo asks something better:
"What was actually inside that price?"
Once you start looking at prices this way, spending stops being a passive action.
It becomes data.
And data earns.

sections.title: 3. Proof of Expense (PoE)
content: PoE (Proof of Expense) is simple and honest.
You upload a real receipt.
The system analyzes what's inside the price.
Hidden costs come to light.
You earn tokens because you provided real-world data.
No fake actions.
No button clicking with bots.
No rewards that come "just from feelings".
If you spend in real life, you can mine on Yumo Yumo.

sections.title: 4. Data Contribution, but make it normal life
content: Forget GPUs.
Forget warehouses full of machines.
In Yumo Yumo, your receipts are your data contribution.
Every valid receipt adds a signal to the system.
Every signal generates tokens.
The cycle is clean:
Spend â†’ Upload â†’ Mine â†’ Earn
You were already doing step one anyway.

sections.title: 5. About tokens (community first)
content: Let's be clear:
No team allocation.
No hidden stash.
No massive budgets set aside for marketing.
No pre-minting tokens for insiders.
Yumo Yumo was built so tokens flow to participants, not a central structure.
If you contribute, you earn.
If you don't, you don't.
That's it.

sections.title: 6. "But how is this funded?"
content: It's not funded the usual way.
No massive marketing budgets.
No paid advertising machines.
No artificial demand.
Yumo Yumo grows through the Web3 way:
Through participation, contribution, and shared incentives.
Value comes from what people do, not from team promises.

sections.title: 7. Why Web3 at all?
content: Because rules matter more than people.
Web3 guarantees:
Rewards follow predefined logic.
Distribution cannot be changed manually.
No one behind the curtain can decide "who gets what".
Spending becomes a shared signal.
Tokens flow back to the people who create that signal.
Simple systems survive.
Non-transparent ones get eliminated.

sections.title: 8. Who is this actually for?
content: People who spend money.
Those who love contributing data but also want to sleep.
Those who prefer rules over stories.
You don't need to trade.
You don't need to use leverage.
You don't need to predict charts.
Just upload receipts.

sections.title: 9. The bigger picture
content: Yumo Yumo starts with awareness.
Over time, this awareness becomes:
Deeper insights.
Smarter financial tools.
A growing ecosystem built on real spending data.
All supported by the people who actually spend the money.

sections.title: 10. Final thought
content: Money already leaves your wallet every day.
Yumo Yumo doesn't try to stop that.
It just lets you mine while it happens.
The cycle: Spend â” Upload â” Mine â” Earn
That's the cycle.
